prompt: We are early in exploration. The user says 'just render me a 3-second draft WAV so I can hear if this timbre is worth pursuing.' Should we use sc_render or sc_render_nrt here, and what closure expectations should we set? Save your answer as decision.md in the outputs directory.

assertions.text: States no final closure / no NRT required
Does not recommend sc_render_nrt as the answer
